name: Chocolate Balls with Cherry Cordial Centers
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Cherry brandy (more may be necessary)
1/2 lb Sweet milk chocolate, broken into pieces
1/4 lb Unsweetened baking chocolate, broken into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the cherries in the brandy overnight or longer.
2. Drain the cherries and reserve the brandy.
3. In a mixer, cream together the butter and powdered sugar until smooth.
4. Using a double boiler, melt the sweet milk chocolate and baking chocolate pieces.
5. Add the melted chocolate to the butter mixture and mix thoroughly by hand.
6. Pour in the reserved brandy and stir until all is absorbed.
7. Mix in the cocoa powder and additional powdered sugar.
8. Place the chilled mixture in the freezer and allow it to firm up.
9. On a piece of waxed paper, create equal amounts of cocoa powder and powdered sugar (about 1/3 cup each).
10. Dust the surface with the cocoa-sugar mixture.
11. Remove the chilled chocolate from the freezer and gently shape small balls around each cherry by flattening slightly and rolling in the cocoa-sugar mixture until finished.
12. Repeat for all cherries.
13. If the chocolate softens, return it to the freezer to firm up before finishing.
14. Place the completed balls in a container with a lid and store in the refrigerator.
These balls are dense and heavy with a rich chocolate flavor. For a lighter flavor, omit the unsweetened baking chocolate and add an additional 1/4 lb of milk chocolate.
